title: Brent oil price posts biggest monthly loss in six years as market counts on a U.S.-Iran deal
summary_full: Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump said he would meet in the White House Situation Room to make a final decision about a deal with Iran.
summary_public: Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump said he would meet in the White House Situation Room to make a final decision about a deal with Iran.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: market counts on a U.S.-Iran deal
